message:
Running command: # Check GPIO, UART, I2C register layouts
grep -n "paddr\|CTRL\|STATUS\|register" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_GPIO/rtl/nc_gpio.v | head -30
echo "---"
grep -n "offset\|ADDR\|case.*8'h\|8'hxx" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_UART/rtl/nc_uart.v | head -30
echo "---"
grep -n "CTRL\|DIR\|DATA\|DIN\|DOUT\|DIRCFG" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_GPIO/rtl/nc_gpio.v | head -20
